ui.title_today: Is it Hot in Macedonia Today?
ui.label_effects: Some effects of the climate changes

today.explain1: Today's peak is the highest temperature forecast across all 20 stations, ranked against 70+ years of ERA5-Land records for this same ±7-day window. The colour and label show where today falls in the full historical range.
today.chart_title: Macedonia daily max temperatures for the two weeks around {day_label} since {year_min}
today.trend_title: Macedonia peak temperatures around {day_label} · {year_min}–{year_max} with linear projection to 2050
today.explain2: The curve shows how often each peak temperature occurred on days like today across all years. Colours mark climatological zones — from cold blue through the typical beige band to extreme red — so you can see at a glance where today sits.
today.explain3: Each dot is the average of the 15 hottest days recorded anywhere in Macedonia during this ±7-day window each year since {year_min}. The Theil-Sen trend is highly significant (p < 0.0001); the dashed line projects it linearly to 2050. The shaded band is the 95% confidence interval — it fans out over time because even a small uncertainty in the slope compounds year after year, reaching roughly ±2.8°C by 2050. Think of it as the range of plausible futures if current warming continues at the same pace.

hero.verdict_warming: A century to warm by {sign}{t100} {unit} – at current pace, every {yrs} years adds another degree.
hero.verdict_cooling: A century to cool by {sign}{t100} {unit} – at current pace, every {yrs} years adds another degree.
hero.verdict_none: No detectable trend at this day of year.

about.heading: About us
about.col1_text: Climate.mk is a volunteer-driven platform, developed with AI assistance, designed to visualize ERA5 reanalysis data for public education on regional climate change. The project aims to highlight the impacts of global warming on North Macedonia and the surrounding region. You can contact us and contribute via the GitHub page and, if you like what you see, we encourage you to Buy us a coffee.
about.col2_text1: Southeastern Europe is warming at nearly twice the global average rate. The effects are already here - longer summers, shrinking rivers, record-breaking heat, and fires burning wider every year.
about.col2_text2: Numbers make it harder to look away. When you see how many more hot days we've had this decade compared to the last, or how rainfall has shifted over time, it stops feeling like abstract news and starts feeling like what it is: a local problem, happening now. Understanding what's changing - here, in our own backyard - is the first step to doing something about it.
about.col3_text: We utilize statistical methods for slope calculation and to detect trends while correcting for serial correlation. Data processing involves modeling, elevation-based lapse-rate corrections, and window half-width smoothing to analyze multi-decade climate shifts, with visualizations powered by the Highcharts library. For more detailed information about these methods, the website or the regional climate changes, consult our chatbot Ognen, The Climate Assistant or visit the GitHub page.

quotes.author: Sylvia Earle (Oceanographer)
quotes.quote: Even if you never have the chance to see or touch the ocean, the ocean touches you with every breath you take, every drop of water you drink, every bite you consume. Everyone everywhere is inextricably connected to and utterly dependent upon the existence of the sea.

quotes.author: Guy McPherson (Scientist)
quotes.quote: If you really think that the environment is less important than the economy, try holding your breath while you count your money.

quotes.author: Albert Einstein (Physicist)
quotes.quote: The world will not be destroyed by those who do evil, but by those who watch them without doing anything.

quotes.author: Tim Flannery (Scientist)
quotes.quote: One of the biggest obstacles to making a start on climate change is that it has become a cliche before it has even been understood.

quotes.author: Desmond Tutu (Archbishop)
quotes.quote: Twenty-five years ago, people could be excused for not knowing much, or doing much, about climate change. Today we have no excuse.

quotes.author: John Delaney (Politician)
quotes.quote: Climate change is the environmental challenge of this generation, and it is imperative that we act before it's too late.

quotes.author: Native American Proverb
quotes.quote: We do not inherit the earth from our ancestors. We borrow it from our children.

quotes.author: Jay Inslee (Politician)
quotes.quote: We are the first generation to feel the sting of climate change, and we are the last generation that can do something about it.

quotes.author: Bill Nye (Science Communicator)
quotes.quote: Climate change is happening, humans are causing it, and I think this is perhaps the most serious environmental issue facing us.

quotes.author: Frances Beinecke (Environmental Leader)
quotes.quote: Wind and other clean, renewable energy will help end our reliance on fossil fuels and combat the severe threat that climate change poses to humans and wildlife alike.

quotes.author: David Suzuki (Scientist)
quotes.quote: If we pollute the air, water and soil that keep us alive and well, and destroy the biodiversity that allows natural systems to function, no amount of money will save us.

quotes.author: Christian de Duve (Scientist)
quotes.quote: The cost of our success is the exhaustion of natural resources, leading to energy crises, climate change, pollution, and the destruction of our habitat.

quotes.author: Al Gore (Former U.S. Vice President)
quotes.quote: As human beings, we are vulnerable to confusing the unprecedented with the improbable - but the exceptions can kill you, and climate change is one of those exceptions.

quotes.author: Malcolm Turnbull (Politician)
quotes.quote: Climate change is a global problem - truly catastrophic consequences are likely to ensue.

quotes.author: David Attenborough (Naturalist)
quotes.quote: There is no question that climate change is happening; the only arguable point is what part humans are playing in it.

quotes.author: Barack Obama (Former U.S. President)
quotes.quote: The shift to a cleaner energy economy won't happen overnight. But the debate is settled. Climate change is a fact.

quotes.author: Jack Dangermond (Environmental Technologist)
quotes.quote: The world that you and I live in is increasingly challenged: climate change, loss of nature — these are not good stories.

quotes.author: Yuval Noah Harari (Historian)
quotes.quote: We are all living together on a single planet, and if you don't have some kind of global cooperation, you can't tackle climate change.

quotes.author: Nicholas Stern (Economist)
quotes.quote: Climate change is a result of the greatest market failure the world has seen.

quotes.author: Bill Gates (Business Leader)
quotes.quote: By the time we see that climate change is really bad, your ability to fix it is extremely limited.

quotes.author: Leonardo DiCaprio (Actor)
quotes.quote: I play fictitious characters often solving fictitious problems. I believe mankind has looked at climate change as if it were fiction.

quotes.author: Ernest Hemingway (Author)
quotes.quote: The Earth is a fine place and worth fighting for.

quotes.author: Terri Swearingen (Activist)
quotes.quote: We are living on this planet as if we had another one to go to.

quotes.author: Rob Stewart (Filmmaker)
quotes.quote: The Earth should not be a worse place after my life than it was when I was born here.

quotes.author: Pope Francis (Religious Leader)
quotes.quote: God gave us the earth, to till and to keep in a balanced and respectful way.

quotes.author: David King (Scientist)
quotes.quote: Climate change is the most severe problem that we are facing today, more serious even than the threat of terrorism.

quotes.author: Marco Lambertini (Conservation Leader)
quotes.quote: A planet being pushed to the edge will eventually turn on us.

quotes.author: Paul Krugman (Economist)
quotes.quote: The planet will continue to cook.

quotes.author: Arnold Schwarzenegger (Actor & Politician)
quotes.quote: The facts are there that we have created a self-inflicted wound through global warming.

quotes.author: Jonathon Porritt (Environmentalist)
quotes.quote: The future will be green or not at all.

quotes.author: David Attenborough (Naturalist)
quotes.quote: Dealing with global warming means that we have to stop waste.

quotes.author: Al Gore (Former U.S. Vice President)
quotes.quote: We are running out of time, and we must have a planetary solution to a planetary crisis.

quotes.author: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (U.S. Politician)
quotes.quote: We don't have time to sit on our hands as our planet burns. It's life or death.

quotes.author: Archana Soreng (Climate Advocate)
quotes.quote: Indigenous people, local communities, young people, women and girls, should be leaders of climate action and not victims of climate policies.

quotes.author: Richard Branson (Business Leader)
quotes.quote: Climate change is a huge challenge, but it can be brought in line if governments, businesses and individuals work together.

quotes.author: Leah Thomas (Environmental Communicator)
quotes.quote: We can't save the planet without uplifting the voices of its people, especially those most often unheard.

quotes.author: John Lewis (U.S. Civil Rights Leader)
quotes.quote: It is our responsibility to leave this planet cleaner and greener. That must be our legacy.

quotes.author: Greta Thunberg (Climate Activist)
quotes.quote: We can no longer let the people in power decide what hope is. Hope is telling the truth. Hope is taking action.

quotes.author: Mark Ruffalo (Actor)
quotes.quote: Climate change is the greatest threat to our existence in our short history on this planet. Nobody's going to buy their way out of its effects.

quotes.author: Tom Steyer (Investor)
quotes.quote: Demanding that our leaders take action on climate change is safeguarding our health and protecting the future of our children.

quotes.author: Tony Blair (Former UK Prime Minister)
quotes.quote: Global warming is too serious for the world any longer to ignore its danger.

quotes.author: Leonardo DiCaprio (Actor & Environmentalist)
quotes.quote: Climate change is real. It is happening right now. We need to work collectively together and stop procrastinating.

quotes.author: Gisele Bundchen (UN Goodwill Ambassador)
quotes.quote: Deforestation leads to climate change — it's a vicious cycle.

quotes.author: James Cameron (Film Director)
quotes.quote: It's important for me, for my kids, that we're not going to leave them in a world that's in shambles.

quotes.author: Elizabeth May (Politician)
quotes.quote: I hold a vision of this blue green planet, safe and in balance.

quotes.author: Barack Obama (Former U.S. President)
quotes.quote: The United States not only recognises our role in creating this problem, we embrace our responsibility to do something about it.

quotes.author: Xi Jinping (Chinese President)
quotes.quote: Tackling climate change is a shared mission for mankind.

quotes.author: Pope Francis (Religious Leader)
quotes.quote: Now or never. Every year the problems are getting worse.

quotes.author: Edi Rama (Prime Minister, Albania)
quotes.quote: Life goes on with its old habits and our speeches about fighting climate change change nothing.

quotes.author: Wopke Hoekstra (European Commissioner for Climate)
quotes.quote: Climate neutrality is not just a slogan, it is also our commitment under the Paris Agreement.

quotes.author: Simon Stiell (UN Climate Change Executive Secretary)
quotes.quote: The climate crisis is an urgent national security crisis that should be at the top of every cabinet room agenda.

quotes.author: Simon Stiell (UN Climate Change Executive Secretary)
quotes.quote: Surrender is not an option. And half measures are a recipe for failure.

quotes.author: Carl Sagan (Physicist)
quotes.quote: Anything else you're interested in is not going to happen if you can't breathe the air and drink the water.

quotes.author: Michio Kaku (Physicist)
quotes.quote: Global warming is real. It is a slow-moving catastrophe that will reshape the geography of the planet.

quotes.author: Robert Redford (Actor)
quotes.quote: The environment should be in the category of national security. Defense of our resources is just as important as defense abroad.

quotes.author: Cate Blanchett (Actor)
quotes.quote: Climate change is a tragedy that is unfolding before our eyes, yet we still look away.

quotes.author: Goran Bregovic (Musician)
quotes.quote: We treat the earth like a rented hotel room, making a mess because we think we won't be here tomorrow to clean it up.

quotes.author: Rade Serbedzija (Actor)
quotes.quote: We worry so much about borders and history, while the very nature supporting our lives is quietly collapsing beneath us.

quotes.author: Vlatko Stefanovski (Musician)
quotes.quote: We sing about the beauty of our mountains and rivers, but song is not enough to protect them from the changes we inflict.

quotes.author: Bora Dugic (Musician)
quotes.quote: Nature has its own harmony, and when humanity alters the climate, we introduce a devastating discord into the world.

quotes.author: Janis Varoufakis (Economist/Politician)
quotes.quote: Climate change is the ultimate market failure; capitalism is destroying the ecological foundations upon which it relies.

quotes.author: Dusan Kovacevic (Playwright)
quotes.quote: We are writing a tragic final act for the planet, pretending that the script can be changed at the last second.

quotes.author: Stephen Hawking (Physicist)
quotes.quote: We are close to the tipping point where global warming becomes irreversible.

quotes.author: Richard Feynman (Physicist)
quotes.quote: For a successful technology, reality must take precedence over public relations, for nature cannot be fooled.

quotes.author: Olafur Eliasson (Artist)
quotes.quote: Climate change is not an abstract concept; it is a physical reality that demands a creative response.

quotes.author: Jane Fonda (Actor)
quotes.quote: This is a collective crisis that requires collective action. The climate crisis is an all-hands-on-deck emergency.

quotes.author: Barack Obama (Politician)
quotes.quote: We are the first generation to feel the effect of climate change and the last generation who can do something about it.

quotes.author: Greta Thunberg (Activist)
quotes.quote: Our house is on fire. I am here to say, our house is on fire.

quotes.author: Marina Abramovic (Performance Artist)
quotes.quote: Adding climate change, it truly feels like the end of the world because we are destroying the planet.

quotes.author: Slavoj Zizek (Philosopher)
quotes.quote: We like to be guilty since, if we are guilty, it all depends on us. We engage in frantic activities just so we can be sure that we are doing something.

quotes.author: Stevo Pendarovski (Politician)
quotes.quote: Climate change is no longer a distant threat; it is a harsh reality affecting our ecosystems and requiring immediate global cooperation.

quotes.author: Milco Mancevski (Film Director)
quotes.quote: We treat nature as an endless resource for entertainment and profit, forgetting that when it breaks, we break with it.

quotes.author: Goran Stefanovski (Playwright)
quotes.quote: We are destroying the very soil and air that gave us a voice, acting as if we have another home waiting for us in the stars.

quotes.author: Paul McCartney (Musician)
quotes.quote: The person in the song will be symbolic of politicians who argue that climate change is a hoax. This idea of 'It's all gonna be fine, don't worry.' Oh yeah, sure, there are icebergs melting but it doesn't matter.

quotes.author: Billie Eilish (Musician)
quotes.quote: Hills burn in California. My turn to ignore ya. Don't say I didn't warn ya.

quotes.author: Neil Young (Musician)
quotes.quote: We heard the warning calls. Ignored them. We watched the weather change. We saw the fires and floods. We saw the people rise divided. We fought each other while we lost our coveted prize.

quotes.author: Lana Del Rey (Musician)
quotes.quote: L.A.'s in flames, it's getting hot. The world is getting hotter. Hope is a dwindling resource. We don't have much time left.

quotes.author: Pharrell Williams (Musician)
quotes.quote: We have to take care of the planet. We have one shot at this. We need to make eco-friendly choices and support sustainable fashion.

quotes.author: Eddie Vedder (Musician)
quotes.quote: We need to minimize our carbon footprint and raise awareness about global warming. Every action counts.

quotes.author: Dave Matthews (Musician)
quotes.quote: The environment is a shared responsibility. We must support organizations fighting for our planet's future.

quotes.author: Xiuhtezcatl Martinez (Musician & Activist)
quotes.quote: How will you look your child in the eyes and tell them their future wasn't worth fighting for, could've done more but didn't listen, didn't wake up, didn't speak up, didn't fight back when there was still time.

quotes.author: Jaden Smith (Actor & Musician)
quotes.quote: We have to save our planet. It's the only one we have.

quotes.author: Emma Thompson (Actor)
quotes.quote: We need urgent action on the climate crisis. There is no Planet B.

quotes.author: Julia Louis-Dreyfus (Actor)
quotes.quote: Corporate interests have sought to mislead the public about climate change. We must fight for the truth.

quotes.author: Shailene Woodley (Actor)
quotes.quote: We have to preserve natural resources for future generations. The time for action is now.

quotes.author: Cameron Diaz (Actor)
quotes.quote: Environmental issues from rainforest deforestation to water pollution affect us all. We must act responsibly.

quotes.author: Gwyneth Paltrow (Actor)
quotes.quote: We can make better choices that benefit our health and the environment. Every small step counts.

quotes.author: Matt Damon (Actor)
quotes.quote: Climate justice is essential. Clean water and a healthy environment are basic human rights.

quotes.author: Emma Watson (Actor)
quotes.quote: As consumers we have so much power to change the world by just being careful in what we buy.

quotes.author: Jane Goodall (Primatologist)
quotes.quote: Fortunately, nature is amazingly resilient: places we have destroyed, given time and help, can once again support life, and endangered species can be given a second chance.

quotes.author: Al Gore (Politician)
quotes.quote: Solutions to the climate crisis are within reach, but in order to capture them, we must take urgent action today across every level of society.

quotes.author: Joaquin Phoenix (Actor)
quotes.quote: We feel entitled to artificially inseminate a cow and steal her baby, even though her cries of anguish are unmistakable. We think we need to sacrifice something to change. But we can be inventive.

quotes.author: Harrison Ford (Actor)
quotes.quote: Nature doesn't need people. People need nature. Nature would survive the extinction of the human being and go on just fine, but human culture, human beings, cannot survive without nature.

quotes.author: Woody Harrelson (Actor)
quotes.quote: We have to start thinking about the planet as our home, not as something to conquer. We need to work with nature, not against it.

quotes.author: Meryl Streep (Actor)
quotes.quote: Climate change is real. We owe it to future generations to acknowledge the science and take action.

quotes.author: Jason Momoa (Actor)
quotes.quote: The ocean is dying. We need to do everything we can to protect our waters and our planet for our children.

quotes.author: Bono (Musician)
quotes.quote: Climate change is not just an environmental issue. It's a human rights issue, an economic issue, and a security issue.

quotes.author: Chris Martin — Coldplay (Musician)
quotes.quote: We've decided to put the tour on pause until we work out how to make it sustainable and beneficial for the environment.

quotes.author: Jack Johnson (Musician)
quotes.quote: We all have a responsibility to protect the planet. Small changes in our daily lives can make a big difference.

quotes.author: Sting (Musician)
quotes.quote: We are destroying our planet with such reckless abandon. The rainforests are the lungs of the world and we're cutting them down.

effects: Hotter and longer summers with more frequent extreme heatwaves
Record-breaking temperatures becoming more common each decade
Urban heat islands intensifying in cities like Athens, Belgrade, and Bucharest
Warmer winters with fewer frost days
Increased number of tropical nights (temperatures staying above 20°C at night)
Heat-related deaths rising, especially among elderly populations
Animals and plants shifting their seasonal behaviors (earlier springs, later autumns)
Severe and prolonged droughts reducing water availability
Decreased summer rainfall with more erratic precipitation patterns
Lower river flows threatening drinking water supplies
Shrinking lakes and reservoirs across the region
Groundwater depletion accelerating due to over-extraction and low recharge
Reduced snowpack on Balkan mountain ranges
Glacial and permafrost retreat in higher elevations
Longer dry seasons stressing both ecosystems and agriculture
Increased competition over shared water resources between countries
More intense flash floods during autumn and spring
Stronger and more unpredictable storms
Increased frequency of hail events damaging crops and property
More frequent extreme rainfall events causing urban flooding
River flooding becoming more severe in short, intense episodes
Landslides increasing due to unstable, saturated soils after heavy rain
Crop yield losses due to heat stress and drought
Wine-growing regions shifting northward and to higher altitudes
Olive cultivation becoming viable further north but declining in the south
Soil degradation and desertification spreading in southern areas
Longer and more intense pest and disease seasons harming crops
Pollinator decline linked to climate disruption affecting harvests
Livestock suffering from heat stress, reducing productivity
Irrigation water demands rising sharply, straining resources
More frequent and destructive wildfires, especially in Greece and North Macedonia
Forest die-offs due to drought and bark beetle outbreaks
Invasive plant species spreading into new territories
Fish populations in rivers declining due to warmer, lower water levels
Coral bleaching and habitat loss in the Adriatic and Aegean seas
Migratory bird patterns shifting, with some species no longer wintering in the region
Spread of invasive species disrupting local ecosystems
Sea level rise threatening low-lying coastal areas along the Adriatic and Black Sea
Coastal erosion accelerating, destroying beaches and infrastructure
Mediterranean Sea warming faster than the global ocean average
Increased frequency of jellyfish blooms disrupting tourism and fisheries
Saltwater intrusion into coastal freshwater aquifers
Spread of tropical diseases such as West Nile virus and dengue fever
Expansion of tiger mosquito and sandfly habitats carrying new pathogens
Worsening air quality due to heat, drought, and wildfires
Increased respiratory and cardiovascular illness from heat and pollution
Mental health impacts from climate anxiety and repeated disaster exposure
Climate-driven migration from rural and coastal areas into cities
Economic losses in tourism due to extreme heat and degraded natural environments
Strain on energy grids from soaring summer air-conditioning demand
Higher food prices driven by regional crop failures
Increased dust storms and Saharan dust intrusions reducing air quality
